message: Dark vessel detected NE of Chennai coast — no AIS transponder active. Possible sanctions evasion or contraband activity.
Unauthorized vessel detected in Naval Exclusion Zone (NEZ-KOCHI-01) without AIS or clearance. Immediate interception recommended.
AIS position reported 3.2nm from SAR-confirmed location. Vessel is transmitting false position data — AIS spoofing confirmed.
Small vessel operating in EEZ Fishing Restriction Zone with no AIS broadcast. IUU fishing activity strongly suspected.
Discrepancy of 1.8nm between reported AIS position and SAR detection. Monitoring for escalation — possible equipment malfunction or intentional spoofing.
Research vessel briefly entered 2nm buffer zone of Restricted Naval Research Area (RNRA-002). Vessel has since exited — incident logged.
Bulk carrier exhibiting loitering behavior near Port Exclusion Zone. AIS active but movement inconsistent with declared transit. Elevated monitoring.
Vessel speed dropped from 18.2kt to 2.4kt in a 10-minute window with no reported mechanical issue. Behavior consistent with rendezvous or transfer activity.
LNG carrier on standard VLCC deep-water route. AIS fully compliant. Monitoring for berth approach clearance.
Passenger ferry on scheduled Chennai–Andaman route. All systems nominal. AIS tracking active.
Authorized tug operating under Kochi Port Authority permit. All documentation verified.
Container ship on verified JNPT–Chennai corridor. AIS matches SAR position within 0.1nm. Route fully compliant.
